subject: math
activity_templates: A cute cartoon kid character solving a single-digit addition worksheet. Show 6 addition problems like '2 + 3 = __' in large friendly numbers across the page. {{character}} smiles and holds a pencil in the corner.
A single-page addition worksheet with 8 problems (e.g. '1 + 4 = __', '5 + 2 = __'). Header reads 'Addition Practice' in big playful letters. {{character}} waves in the top corner.
A counting-to-add worksheet: three rows, each showing groups of cute cartoon objects to be counted and added (e.g. 3 apples + 2 apples). {{character}} cheers in the margin.
An addition number-line worksheet with a colorful number line 0-10. {{character}} hops along the number line to solve '3 + 4 = __', and there are 4 more problems below.
